_description: Core rules for generating valid semantic Xpell XUI JSON views.
_core_rules: Do NOT return HTML, CSS, markdown, or explanations.
Prefer concrete XUI wrappers over raw XHTML.
Use xhtml ONLY if no wrapper or semantic alias exists.
Runtime-managed fields must start with '_' and use snake_case.
Prefer semantic fields such as _variant, _tone, _size, _density, and _elevation instead of raw class/style.
Use _theme only at app/view root level when generating themed apps.
Do NOT use raw style or class unless explicitly requested.
Use _type:"textarea" for textarea controls. Do NOT emulate textarea with input/type attributes.
Use semantic HTML aliases like section, nav, h1, p, ul, li only when they improve structure.
Note: _type:"section" is an HTML alias. Dashboard section component is _type:"xsection".
_anti_patterns: Using class/style as the primary styling system

_anti_patterns._reason: Use semantic fields like _variant, _tone, _size, _density instead of framework classes.
